---
title: "Home"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: "images/profile.jpg"
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:imotdnif43@snu.ac.kr"
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: "https://github.com/KunwooPark"
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/kunwoo-park-38ba13329/"
    - icon: mortarboard
      text: Google Scholar
      href: "https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=KrNjLQgAAAAJ"
---

## Kunwoo Park

PhD student researcher

Affiliation: Intelligent Wave Systems Laboratory, Department of Electrical and Computer Engineering, Seoul National University

I am a PhD student researcher working in photonics and related areas. A fuller biography can be added here later with a short overview of academic background, current research focus, and broader interests.

## Research Interests

- Optical Computing
- Disordered Photonics
- Topological Photonics
- Open Quantum Systems
- AI for Science

## Research Overview

Add a short research overview here. This section can summarize your broader agenda, how your projects connect, and what kinds of systems, questions, or methods you focus on.

## Selected Directions

### Hypergraph Models of Scattering for Accelerating Material Design

Add 2-3 sentences here describing one representative direction or project area.

### Monolayer Non-Abelian Integrated Photonics via Floquet Engineering

Add 2-3 sentences here describing another research direction, method, or long-term goal.

### Expressivity and Trainability of All-Optical Neural Networks

Add 2-3 sentences here describing a third direction, collaboration area, or modeling theme.
